sections.subtitle: Current Form
sections.text: Milan has shown mixed results in their last 5 matches with 3 wins and 2 losses, scoring an average of 1.6 goals per game while conceding 1.2. Monza, in contrast, struggles significantly with only 1 win in their last 5 matches, scoring 0.6 goals per game and conceding 2.2 on average, reflecting their poor league standing.

sections.subtitle: Head-to-Head Record
sections.text: In the last two head-to-head matches, Milan has dominated Monza with a 3-1 home victory and a 1-0 away win. Milan has consistently scored first and created more big chances in these encounters.

sections.subtitle: Season Statistics
sections.text: Milan ranks 4th in total goals scored (59) and has a strong attacking output with key players like Pulisic and Reijnders in form. Monza, sitting at the bottom of the table with only 28 goals scored and 67 conceded, shows significant defensive vulnerabilities.

sections.subtitle: Key Factors
sections.text: Milan benefits from home advantage at San Siro and has a superior squad depth despite some missing players. Monza's inability to keep clean sheets (12 matches without one) and their poor away form tilt the odds heavily in Milan's favor.
